name: Cornish Hens with Creamy Chipotle Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 each Cornish game hens, about 1 1/4 pounds
1 large white onion, sliced 3/8 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the hens and pat dry. Place them in a bowl and coat with Roasted Tomatillo-Chipotle Salsa. Cover and let stand at room temperature for 1 hour.
2. In a large pot of boiling salted water, cook the green beans and onion slices until both are crisp-tender, about 4 minutes. Drain and spread out on a tray to cool.
3. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C). Scrape the marinade from the hens back into the bowl and stir in the heavy cream. Place the hens, breast side up, in a large oiled roasting pan with the legs facing out. Brush hens with oil and season with salt.
4. Roast in the middle of the oven for 15 minutes. Arrange the green beans and onions around the hens, pour the marinade over, and roast for about 20 minutes longer, or until the thigh juices run clear when pierced.
5. Transfer the hens and vegetables to a serving platter and cover loosely with foil. Spoon off any fat from the pan sauce. Set the roasting pan on moderate heat in the oven for 1 minute, scraping up any browned bits. Season with salt.
6. Spoon half of the sauce around the hens and serve with the remaining sauce.
